title: Nooby's Tropics
body:
## About
A very simple texture pack, "Nooby's Tropics" swaps out the main menu background for I consider to be a tropical panorama. I hope you enjoy. This panorama is also available [by night](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/noobys-tropics-night).

Thanks to the creators of the following packs, with which this panorama was made possible:

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

- **Biomes/Terrain:** [Overhauled Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/wwoo)
- **Structures:** [Ships On Seas](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/rainbeau-s-ships-on-seas-sos/)
- **Shaders:** [Enhanced Default](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/sildurs-enhanced-default)
